Dear Lawrence,

As a first-year student at the Reconstructionist Rabbinical College, I’m learning that Passover can be about more than our own liberation from Egypt. At its best, Passover can be a demand to seek the liberation of others.

As a rabbinic intern this year, I’m organizing for immigrant rights through a Jewish lens. And what that lens shows me is that freedom is incompl... [truncated]
